title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 277.130 - Licensee shall determine true ownership
text:
277.130.  Licensee shall determine true ownership. — The licensee shall use reasonable care to determine the true ownership and source of any livestock sold or offered for sale and shall keep a record of same.
(L. 1943 p. 310 § 13, A.L. 1957 p. 20)
